User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about the registered user, including active settings and birthdate age checks.

uid.description: The user ID directly matching their authentication.

selectedVoice.description: Voice selection from Puck, Charon, Kore, Fenrir, Zephyr.

curseMode.description: Whether the user allows AI to mildly curse if requested.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was initialized.

Chat.title: Chat Topic
Chat.description: Conversation topic metadata containing information about a chat session.

title.description: Title or summary of the chat.

Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: Individual messages that are sent by the user or the assistant inside a chat session.

imageUrl.description: Optional attached or processed image URL.

Generation.title: Generated Asset
Generation.description: Log of AI image and video generations used for enforcing daily limit values and gallery items.

prompt.description: The description prompt entered by the user.

url.description: Accessible URL of the image/video visual asset.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection storing the active user profiles.

/chats/{chatId}.description: Collection storing user chat metadata entries.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection under chats comprising the conversational log.

/generations/{generationId}.description: Collection storing logged images & videos produced.
